title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—CLI and Go library for downloading, serving and chatting with GGUF models locally via a simple REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and async wrapper for the Ollama HTTP API; installable via PyPI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Full-featured web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) for chatting, model management, RAG and multi-user workspaces; runs in Docker.

title: continue/continue
summary: VS Code & JetBrains plugin that adds local LLM code completion via Ollama; supports custom model configs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset for using Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that routes suggestions through local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo showing how to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI (Python) for multi-session chat, markdown rendering and model switching; pip installable.

title: ollama-node
summary: Community-maintained Node-RED nodes to call Ollama chat/embed endpoints from low-code flows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models to Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama, WebUI, Chroma, Open-WebUI for quick local playgrounds.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Ask Ollama” command to summarize or chat about your vault notes privately.

title: ollama-mcp-server
summary: Model-Context-Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tools provider for Claude Desktop & other MCP clients.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate (crates.io: ollama-rs) providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library (NuGet: OllamaSharp) for chatting, embedding and pulling models from Ollama in C#.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models to your server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit app template for chatting with Ollama models, including voice input via browser.

title: awesome-ollama
summary: Curated list of Ollama tools, libraries, tutorials, models and community projects.
